per_episode.task_description: Pick up the brown pinecone keychain with charm and place it in or on the round dark stone bowl
Pick up the sleek slim dark phone with camera and place it in or on the round dark stone bowl
Pick up the plastic cup and place it in or on the gray bowl
Pick up the instrumentation and place it in or on the handmade ceramic bowl
Pick up the slim black remote with buttons and place it in or on the wooden box
Pick up the slender green pointed metal tool and place it in or on the medium blue cooking pot
Pick up the rectangular green tissue box with tissues and place it in or on the gray bowl
Pick up the curved metallic hunting knife with handle and place it in or on the white bowl with blue
Pick up the digital watch and place it in or on the olive green military box
Pick up the blue remote and place it in or on the red clay bowl with zigzag pattern
